positive: Minimalist graphic design of a stylized, retro-futuristic cityscape at twilight. The scene features soaring geometric skyscrapers interwoven with lush, oversized tropical foliage (palm fronds, banana leaves) creating a strong silhouette effect against a vivid, gradient sky of deep indigo merging into magenta and electric teal. A single, stylized flying object (like a paper origami crane or a geometric hot air balloon) navigates the upper corner. High contrast, clean lines, limited palette (indigo, teal, magenta, black), perfect symmetry, vector illustration style, designed for apparel print, clean edges, maximalist details in the foliage, flat graphic aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, excessive detail, watermark, text, noisy, grainy, blur, poor anatomy, artifacts, low resolution, logo, celebrity, copyright, low contrast, grayscale, sketch
